```{=html}
<div id="map" style="height: 400px; margin: 1em 0;"></div>
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://unpkg.com/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.css"/>
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.4.0/css/all.min.css"/>
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/Leaflet.awesome-markers/2.0.2/leaflet.awesome-markers.css"/>
<script src="https://unpkg.com/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/leaflet.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/Leaflet.awesome-markers/2.0.2/leaflet.awesome-markers.min.js"></script>
<script>
  var map = L.map('map').setView([47.218, 8.663], 14);
  L.tileLayer('https://{s}.tile.openstreetmap.org/{z}/{x}/{y}.png', {
    attribution: '© OpenStreetMap contributors'
  }).addTo(map);

  function popup(label, gmaps, osm) {
    return label + '<br><a href="' + gmaps + '" target="_blank">Google Maps</a> / <a href="' + osm + '" target="_blank">OSM</a>';
  }

  var markers = [
    { lat: 47.2292959, lng: 8.6751853, label: popup("Bahnhof Wädenswil",       "https://maps.app.goo.gl/qGCxvWmEtDBYaSfF7", "https://www.openstreetmap.org/#map=18/47.2292959/8.6751853"),  icon: "train",  color: "blue",       zIndex: 0 },
    { lat: 47.213542, lng: 8.664540,   label: popup("Wädenswil, Feld (Bus)",    "https://maps.app.goo.gl/PMDwvDAzXP1td8WYA", "https://www.openstreetmap.org/?mlat=47.213542&mlon=8.664540#map=19/47.213542/8.664540"), icon: "bus", color: "blue", zIndex: 0 },
    { lat: 47.213496, lng: 8.659407,   label: popup("Pavillon (Kurzparkieren)", "https://maps.app.goo.gl/REjLALgVxMdtDYXH9", "https://www.openstreetmap.org/?#map=18/47.213496/8.659407"),   icon: "square-parking", color: "cadetblue", zIndex: 0, rotate: 180 },
    { lat: 47.210365, lng: 8.655490,   label: popup("St. Anna's Kapelle (~10 Min. Fussweg)", "https://maps.app.goo.gl/jc89fLVDkopRd1mD8", "https://www.openstreetmap.org/?#map=19/47.210365/8.655490"), icon: "square-parking", color: "cadetblue", zIndex: 0 },
    { lat: 47.213814, lng: 8.659451,   label: popup("Langrütistrasse 40",       "https://maps.app.goo.gl/ba34CYrTu24eViqM8", "https://www.openstreetmap.org/?#map=19/47.213814/8.659451"),   icon: "house",  color: "red",        zIndex: 1000 },
  ];

  markers.forEach(function(m) {
    var markerIcon;
    if (m.rotate) {
      var html = '<div style="width:35px;height:45px;transform:rotate(' + m.rotate + 'deg);transform-origin:17px 42px;">' +
                 '<div class="awesome-marker awesome-marker-icon-' + m.color + '">' +
                 '<i class="fa fa-' + m.icon + ' icon-white" style="transform:rotate(-' + m.rotate + 'deg);"></i>' +
                 '</div></div>';
      markerIcon = L.divIcon({
        html: html,
        className: '',
        iconSize: [35, 45],
        iconAnchor: [17, 42],
        popupAnchor: [1, -34]
      });
    } else {
      markerIcon = L.AwesomeMarkers.icon({ icon: m.icon, prefix: 'fa', markerColor: m.color });
    }
    L.marker([m.lat, m.lng], { icon: markerIcon, zIndexOffset: m.zIndex }).addTo(map).bindPopup(m.label);
  });
</script>
```
